tools.name: list_leads
tools.description: List CRM leads and/or opportunities with optional filters

tools.name: search_leads
tools.description: Full-text search across leads and opportunities

tools.name: get_lead
tools.description: Get full details of a single lead or opportunity

tools.name: create_lead
tools.description: Create a new CRM lead or opportunity

tools.name: update_lead
tools.description: Update fields on an existing lead or opportunity

tools.name: delete_lead
tools.description: Permanently delete a lead or opportunity

tools.name: archive_lead
tools.description: Archive (soft-delete) a lead or opportunity

tools.name: unarchive_lead
tools.description: Restore an archived lead or opportunity

tools.name: mark_lead_won
tools.description: Mark a lead/opportunity as Won

tools.name: mark_lead_lost
tools.description: Mark a lead/opportunity as Lost

tools.name: convert_lead_to_opportunity
tools.description: Convert a lead into a qualified opportunity

tools.name: move_lead_to_stage
tools.description: Move a lead or opportunity to a specific pipeline stage

tools.name: assign_lead
tools.description: Assign a lead to a salesperson and/or team

tools.name: get_lost_reasons
tools.description: Get available lost reasons for marking opportunities

tools.name: bulk_update_leads
tools.description: Update multiple leads/opportunities at once

tools.name: list_stages
tools.description: List all pipeline stages

tools.name: get_stage
tools.description: Get details of a specific pipeline stage

tools.name: create_stage
tools.description: Create a new pipeline stage

tools.name: update_stage
tools.description: Update an existing pipeline stage

tools.name: delete_stage
tools.description: Delete a pipeline stage

tools.name: reorder_stages
tools.description: Reorder pipeline stages by setting their sequence numbers

tools.name: list_teams
tools.description: List all CRM sales teams

tools.name: get_team
tools.description: Get details of a specific sales team

tools.name: create_team
tools.description: Create a new sales team

tools.name: update_team
tools.description: Update an existing sales team

tools.name: add_team_member
tools.description: Add a salesperson to a sales team

tools.name: remove_team_member
tools.description: Remove a salesperson from a sales team

tools.name: get_team_pipeline
tools.description: Get full pipeline view for a specific sales team

tools.name: list_activity_types
tools.description: List all available activity types

tools.name: schedule_activity
tools.description: Schedule an activity on a lead or opportunity

tools.name: list_lead_activities
tools.description: List all scheduled activities for a specific lead

tools.name: list_my_activities
tools.description: List activities assigned to the current user

tools.name: mark_activity_done
tools.description: Mark an activity as done

tools.name: cancel_activity
tools.description: Cancel a scheduled activity

tools.name: reschedule_activity
tools.description: Reschedule an activity to a new due date

tools.name: log_note_on_lead
tools.description: Log an internal note on a lead's chatter

tools.name: send_message_on_lead
tools.description: Send a message on a lead's chatter

tools.name: get_lead_messages
tools.description: Get the message/chatter history for a lead

tools.name: search_contacts
tools.description: Search for contacts/customers by name, email, or phone

tools.name: get_contact
tools.description: Get full details of a contact or company

tools.name: create_contact
tools.description: Create a new contact or company

tools.name: update_contact
tools.description: Update an existing contact or company

tools.name: get_contact_opportunities
tools.description: Get all CRM opportunities linked to a contact

tools.name: list_countries
tools.description: List all countries available in Odoo

tools.name: list_states
tools.description: List all states/provinces for a given country

tools.name: list_tags
tools.description: List all available CRM tags

tools.name: create_tag
tools.description: Create a new CRM tag

tools.name: update_tag
tools.description: Update an existing CRM tag

tools.name: delete_tag
tools.description: Delete a CRM tag

tools.name: get_pipeline_summary
tools.description: Get a high-level pipeline summary with stage breakdown

tools.name: get_won_lost_analysis
tools.description: Analyze won vs. lost opportunities over a time period

tools.name: get_salesperson_performance
tools.description: Get performance breakdown by salesperson

tools.name: get_leads_by_source
tools.description: Get lead counts grouped by traffic source

tools.name: get_overdue_opportunities
tools.description: List all opportunities with a passed deadline

tools.name: get_pipeline_forecast
tools.description: Forecast expected revenue from the pipeline

tools.name: get_conversion_funnel
tools.description: Get the lead-to-close conversion funnel rates

tools.name: get_leads_created_this_week
tools.description: Count new leads created in the last 7 days

tools.name: list_salespersons
tools.description: List all users who are salespersons in the CRM

tools.name: get_current_user
tools.description: Get information about the currently authenticated user

tools.name: search_users
tools.description: Search for Odoo users by name or email

tools.name: ping
tools.description: Test the connection to Odoo and return server info
